title: T-099 — Schema Migrations Queue screen (SET-033, L1 promotion tracker)
prompt:
# T-099 — Schema Migrations Queue screen (SET-033, L1 promotion tracker)

## Goal
SET-033 Schema Migrations Queue production component (spec-driven; no exact prototype).

Spec-driven UI: no exact canonical prototype exists under `prototypes/design/Monopilot Design System/settings/*.jsx` for this screen. `prototypes/design/02-SETTINGS-UX.md SET-033 / schema-migrations` replaces prototype parity as the authoritative UI contract. Reuse table/status/timeline patterns from admin screens where available; do not implement Promotions screen as the schema migrations queue. Any prototype snippets are element/pattern references only, not 1:1 screen sources. Production contract: data via Server Components (Drizzle); mutations via Server Actions; primitives from `packages/ui` only.

## Files in scope
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/schema/migrations/page.tsx [create]
- apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/schema/migrations/page.test.tsx [create]

## Acceptance criteria (all must hold)
- Given the production page renders, it MUST satisfy `prototypes/design/02-SETTINGS-UX.md SET-033 / schema-migrations` as the source of truth. UX spec replaces prototype parity for this task; no wrong/adjacent prototype may be used as a 1:1 source. Reused prototype elements must be limited to matching primitives/patterns and must not change the screen semantics, routes, fields, or states required by the UX spec.
- Given filter status='pending', when page renders, then only pending rows are listed and each row shows a 'View migration script' button (read-only).
- Given a row is clicked, when detail panel opens, then `migration_script` is shown in a read-only CodeMirror SQL view.

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: write RTL test that mounts the page with mocked data and asserts the parity AC items + ac_extra coverage.
- GREEN: build component, wire Server Action(s).
- Run `pnpm --filter @monopilot/web vitest run apps/web/app/[locale]/(admin)/settings/schema/migrations/page.test.tsx [create]` and `pnpm typecheck`.

## Risk red lines
- Do not import @radix-ui/react-dialog outside packages/ui (§0 ESLint rule).
- Do not paste prototype JSX wholesale — translate to production contract.
- Do not regress accessibility (axe violations = fail).
- Do not claim 1:1 prototype parity for this screen; exact prototype is missing and UX spec is authoritative.
